theme_and_archetype.vibe: Editorial Museum. Pure whites, soft 10% grays, pitch black accents, massive editorial typography, sub-pixel grid perfection, Apple-like smoothness and micro-interactions.

primary.usage: Hero headlines, large display numbers in bento grid, primary titles.
primary.styles: Use normal or italic. Do not use bold (font-normal is preferred for elegance).

secondary.usage: UI elements, body copy, meta labels, category pills, buttons.
secondary.styles: font-medium for UI, font-normal for body, uppercase with wide tracking for meta labels.

hierarchy_rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-normal tracking-tight leading-none
hierarchy_rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-normal tracking-tight leading-tight

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento layout with strict responsive columns (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-12).

header.classes: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-black/5
header.content: Brand name (Instrument Serif), simple nav links, 'Archive' CTA.

hero_section.layout: Massive negative space, left or center aligned text.
hero_section.typography: Huge Instrument Serif for 'Suitcase & Life'. Very small, wide-spaced Manrope for 'A SNEAK PEEK INTO OUR SMALL ARCHIVE OF GATHERED CURIOSITIES'.

bento_grid.layout: Asymmetric. Example: A large dominant card (col-span-8 row-span-2), a tall card (col-span-4 row-span-2), a small card (col-span-4 row-span-1), and the Black Accent Tile.
bento_grid.black_accent_tile: MUST be included. bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white. Use large typography, perhaps an isolated product illustration or 'Staff Pick' highlight. No border.
bento_grid.card_style: bg-white p-6 md:p-8 rounded-3xl border border-black/5 overflow-hidden group relative transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-xl
bento_grid.image_treatment: Images inside bento cards should have group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-out.

filter_pills.style: Apple-like segmented controls or individual pills.
filter_pills.active: bg-black text-white rounded-full px-5 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
filter_pills.inactive: text-neutral-500 hover:text-black hover:bg-black/5 rounded-full px-5 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

product_list.layout: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-x-6 gap-y-12
product_list.card: Clean, editorial layout. Image on top (aspect ratio 4:5 or 1:1), thin divider line, then meta info (Name, Price, Category) cleanly stacked below.

product_detail.layout: Two-column split (Museum Plaque style). Left: Sticky media gallery (carousel or stacked images). Right: Scrolling text information.
product_detail.data_points: MUST include: Name, Price, Store, City, Date Acquired, Tags, Story/Description.
product_detail.cta: 'I'm Interested' button (acts as Like/Favorite). Heart icon + text. Black button, white text, full width on mobile, auto width on desktop. Must show Like Counter.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Subtle opacity shifts or scale (1.02) on images. Buttons shift background color.
interactions_and_motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up (Framer Motion) for text and bento cards. 0.5s duration, 0.1s stagger.

icons_and_assets.specific_icons: Heart (for likes), ArrowUpRight (for source links), Grid, LayoutList

testing.requirements: ALL interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='bento-card-1', data-testid='filter-electronics', data-testid='btn-interested').

hero_image.description: Two vintage suitcases on a ribbed surface.

bento_grid_images.description: Black and white analog desk clock
Top-down view of a tan leather chair

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the Google Fonts 'Instrument Serif' and 'Manrope' into the global CSS or index.html.
Use standard React/Tailwind/Framer Motion to build the components. Keep CSS minimal and rely on Tailwind utility classes.
Set up a mock array of products based on the Google Sheets data structure requested: Name, Price, Category, Images(4-6), Link, Description, Store Name, City, Date Acquired, Tags, Likes.
For the Bento Grid, explicitly hardcode the layout using CSS Grid to ensure varying sizes (e.g., using col-span-2, col-span-1) to match the Apple-like asymmetric editorial feel.
Ensure ONE tile in the Bento Grid is styled with the 'black_accent_tile' variables (pure black background, white text).
Build the Product Detail view as a full-page modal or standard separate route. The left side should lock (sticky) the images on desktop, while the right side scrolls.
Include 'I'm Interested' button in product details which increments the like counter.
Do not forget 'data-testid' on all filter pills, product cards, buttons, and navigation elements.
